results.title: Rental market in Budapest shows signs of stabilisation: but premium locations still drive prices up
results.description: Budapest rents are finally stabilising, but don’t be fooled: prices in some districts are still soaring, Airbnb rules are reshaping the market, and premium locations are pushing rents to eye-watering levels. Continue reading: https://dailynewshungary.com/rental-market-budapest-premium-locations/

results.title: DEF board finds way to work around lack of quorum
results.description: The Desert Empire Fair Board of Directors has found a workaround for its lack of quorum, allowing it to make decisions until the governor appoints at least two more people to the board.

results.title: Apave UK: A collaborative powerhouse in global risk management
results.description: Apave UK unites 5 industry leaders, PPL Training, PPL Engineering Services, PIM, Apave IRISNDT, PARC, and Apave TIV to provide a unified approach to safety and compliance across the MOD, Nuclear, Aerospace, Oil & Gas, and Healthcare sectors. For FM professionals, the Apave UK synergies transform a complex regulatory landscape into a streamlined, one-stop safety ...
